purpose: Bounded, deterministic structural screening over a B2 descriptor JSONL and its referenced documents. Reports VTT structure, speaker-label density, disfluency density, and short-line density at fixed operational thresholds, while refusing disposition, authorship, provenance, quality, genre, and AI/human conclusions.
use_when: You need an aggregate corpus-hygiene screen for transcript-like or fragmented documents
You need byte-bound, reproducible structural counts before downstream corpus work
do_not_use_when: You need a content-quality, authorship, provenance, genre, or AI/human verdict
You need automatic corpus disposition, source rewriting, or registration

inputs.target: B2 descriptor manifest JSONL and its referenced UTF-8 documents
required: B2 descriptor and referenced UTF-8 documents

compute.cost_note: stdlib only; no models, network, API, or GPU

examples.description: Screen a bounded descriptor into a create-new private report
